_comment: hcc v0.2 Case 4: preimage concat order verify — canonicalPayload (str) BEFORE chainIdentityJcs (str), both UTF-8 encoded
_d37_change: E-track: canonicalPayload is now a str (JCS JSON string), not raw bytes. Both inputs are UTF-8 encoded internally before concat.
_note: cross-lang must agree on concat order: UTF8(canonicalPayload) + UTF8(chainIdentityJcs) (not reversed). Both inputs are str; UTF-8 encoding is applied internally. Any test verifying sha256 must use this order.
